mapper.insert: /* oms-po-poB2bReqOrderInfoBatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertErpPoB2bReqOrderInfoIntf */ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_B2B_REQORDER ( OWKEY, WBLNO, CTKEY, IBEXPCTDAY, ACKEY, ACNM, PONO, POSEQ, POROW, ICKEY, POQTY, IBEXPCTQTY, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} /* 화주코드 (필요 시 상수/파라미터로 세팅) */, A.WBLNO /* 운송장번호 */, A.CTKEY /* 도착센터코드 */, A.IBEXPCTDAY /* 입하예정일자 */, A.ACKEY /* 납품처 코드 */, A.ACNM /* 납품처 명 */, A.PONO /* 발주PO번호 */, A.POSEQ /* 발주차수 */, A.POROW /* 발주행번 */, A.ICKEY /* 상품번호 */, A.POQTY /* 발주수량 */, A.IBEXPCTQTY /* 입하예정수량 */, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 입력 일시 */, 'BATCH' /* 입력자 */, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 수정 일시 */, 'BATCH' /* 수정자 */ FROM TORDER_EAI_POORDER_BATCH A LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_B2B_REQORDER B ON A.WBLNO = B.WBLNO AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.IBEXPCTDAY = B.IBEXPCTDAY AND A.ACKEY = B.ACKEY AND A.PONO = B.PONO AND A.POSEQ = B.POSEQ AND A.POROW = B.POROW AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY WHERE A.TRN_ID = #{trnId} AND A.WBLNO IS NOT NULL AND A.CTKEY IS NOT NULL AND A.IBEXPCTDAY IS NOT NULL AND A.ACKEY IS NOT NULL AND A.PONO IS NOT NULL AND A.POSEQ IS NOT NULL AND A.POROW IS NOT NULL AND A.ICKEY IS NOT NULL AND B.WBLNO IS NULL AND B.CTKEY IS NULL AND B.IBEXPCTDAY IS NULL AND B.ACKEY IS NULL AND B.PONO IS NULL AND B.POSEQ IS NULL AND B.POROW IS NULL AND B.ICKEY IS NULL
mapper.update: /* oms-po-poB2bReqOrderInfoBatch-sql-oracle.xml - updateErpPoB2bReqOrderInfoIntf */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_B2B_REQORDER M SET ( POQTY, IBEXPCTQTY, INSERTDATE, INSERTURKEY, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY ) = ( SELECT A.POQTY /* 발주수량 */, A.IBEXPCTQTY /* 입하예정수량 */, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 입력 일시 */, 'BATCH' /* 입력자 */, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 수정 일시 */, 'BATCH' /* 수정자 */ FROM TORDER_EAI_POORDER_BATCH A WHERE A.TRN_ID = #{trnId} AND A.WBLNO = M.WBLNO AND A.CTKEY = M.CTKEY AND A.IBEXPCTDAY = M.IBEXPCTDAY AND A.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND A.PONO = M.PONO AND A.POSEQ = M.POSEQ AND A.POROW = M.POROW AND A.ICKEY = M.ICKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_EAI_POORDER_BATCH A WHERE A.TRN_ID = #{trnId} AND A.WBLNO = M.WBLNO AND A.CTKEY = M.CTKEY AND A.IBEXPCTDAY = M.IBEXPCTDAY AND A.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND A.PONO = M.PONO AND A.POSEQ = M.POSEQ AND A.POROW = M.POROW AND A.ICKEY = M.ICKEY )
